# terrible_import_playbook (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `free-form` (String) The name of the imported playbook is specified directly without any other option.

### Read-Only

- `result` (String) Full raw JSON result from Ansible
